title: EvidenceContainerWithTargets
description: Schema for EvidenceContainerWithTargets in Nuix REST API

name.description: Sets the name for the evidence container that is created during ingestion.

customMetadata.description: Sets a map of custom metadata for the evidence container.

encoding.description: Sets the encoding for the evidence container. If the encoding is not set the default system encoding will be used.

custodian.description: Sets the name of the initial custodian for the data.

timeZone.description: Sets the time zone for the evidence container. If the time zone is not set the system's default time zone will be used.

description.description: Sets the description for the evidence container.

locale.description: Sets the locale for the evidence container. Some file types and named entities require a locale for them to be ingested accurately. If not set then the system's default locale will be used. Format is that required by IETF BCP 47 (e.g. 'en-US').

files.description: A list of ingestible files to ingest.

exchangeMailboxes.description: A list of ingestible exchange mailboxes to ingest.

s3Buckets.description: A list of ingestible S3 buckets to ingest.

sqlServers.description: A list of ingestible SQL servers to ingest.

oracleServers.description: A list of ingestible Oracle servers to ingest.

enterpriseVaults.description: A list of ingestible enterprise vaults to ingest.

sharepointSites.description: A list of ingestible sharepoint sites to ingest.

mailStores.description: A list of ingestible mail stores to ingest.

loadFiles.description: A list of ingestible load files to ingest.

centeraClusters.description: A list of ingestible centera clusters to ingest.

splitFiles.description: A list of ingestible split files to ingest.

dropboxes.description: A list of ingestible Dropbox accounts to ingest.

sshServers.description: A list of SSH-based servers to ingest.

twitterLocations.description: A list of historical twitter locations to ingest.

documentumServers.description: A list of documentum servers to ingest.

ms365Locations.description: A list of Microsoft 365 locations to ingest.

slackLocations.description: A list of slack locations to ingest.
